# Estimate translation cost with word-count

> Generated from [`walkthroughs/kapi-word-count.md`](https://github.com/neokapi/neokapi/blob/main/web/walkthroughs/kapi-word-count.md). Do not edit by hand — change the prompt and regenerate.

You need to estimate the cost of a translation before kicking off a vendor job. `kapi word-count` reads any supported format and outputs a quick breakdown so you can put a number on the bill.

## Scene 1 — word-count

<ThemedVideo
  sources={{
    light: "/video/kapi/01-word-count.webm",
    dark: "/video/kapi/01-word-count.webm",
  }}
/>

Point `kapi word-count` at a JSON message catalog and watch it report words, characters, and segment counts. The output is the kind of number you paste into a quote.

## Next

For multi-file projects, point at a directory; the totals roll up.
